description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:8 Docker image. Define three jobs—custom_dataset, prediction, and training—each running in the default test stage. In every job run: apt-get update --fix-missing && apt-get install -y wget bzip2 ca-certificates libglib2.0-0 libxext6 libsm6 libxrender1 git; wget -q https://repo.continuum.io/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh -O miniconda.sh; bash miniconda.sh -b -f -p $HOME/miniconda; export PATH="$HOME/miniconda/bin:$PATH"; conda env create -q -f environment_cpu.yml; source activate pafnucy_env; then for custom_dataset execute three python prepare.py commands with the given glob patterns and output files training_set.hdf, validation_set.hdf, test_set.hdf, followed by python training.py -i ./ -o "test_dataset" --batch_size 100 --num_epochs 3 --rotations 7 13 19; for prediction run python prepare.py -l tests/data/complexes/*/*_ligand.mol2 -p tests/data/complexes/*/*_pocket.mol2 -o test_input.hdf, then python predict.py -i test_input.hdf -o test_predictions.csv, and python predict.py -i test_input.hdf -g 0.75 -d 4.0 -n tests/data/network/net_g075_d4 -o test_predictions.csv; for training run python training.py -i tests/data/dataset/ -o "test" --grid_spacing 0.75 --max_dist 4 --conv_channels 2 2 --dense_sizes 2 2 --num_epochs 2 --rotations 0 1. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
